build.buildCommand: curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com -o get-docker.sh && sh get-docker.sh && curl -L "https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/1.29.2/docker-compose-$(uname -s)-$(uname -m)" -o /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/docker-compose && docker-compose build
